title: The New Yorker
aka: The Explorers (only for a misfiled contribution renewal; see record details)

contents.note: FictionMags (partial; mostly limited to the fiction contributions)

renewed-issues.note: Renewal record appears in the 1963 January-June Books section of the CCE.

renewed-contributions.note: CCE renewal record states issue date as August 19, but the copyright date and original registration ID match the August 20 issue. FictionMags also places this contribution in that issue.

renewed-contributions.note: This is misfiled in the 1965 CCE in Periodicals, listed as a renewal for a magazine titled 'The Explorers', instead of as a renewal for a story by that name that appeared in the New Yorker with the indicated issue date and number.

comment: Pick up with contribution renewals with 1961 Jan-Jun
